title: Trichocephalum pilosum
taxonomy: Trichocephalum pilosum is classified under the family Amaryllidaceae and the order Asparagales. This classification groups it with other plants that have similar characteristics and evolutionary relationships. Specifically, Trichocephalum pilosum is a genus within the subfamily Amaryllidoideae. Further classification places it within the family of flowering plants, or angiosperms. The specific classification of Trichocephalum pilosum is part of ongoing botanical research and may be subject to revision.
